description_long: This doll features a stylized skeleton character with a large, rounded white skull, prominent black eye sockets, and a wide, toothy grin. It is dressed in a light blue hooded jacket with a white zipper, black shorts with a white stripe, and white shoes. The doll stands on a textured, orange, circular base that resembles a tiled or patterned floor. The arms are positioned at its sides, and the hands are tucked into the jacket pockets, giving it a relaxed, casual stance. The back of the doll shows the hood draped over the shoulders and the jacket's hemline. The overall design is cartoonish and playful, with smooth, simplified features and bold color contrasts.
description: A cartoonish skeleton doll in a blue hoodie, black shorts, and white shoes, standing on an orange patterned base. The doll has a wide grin and hands in its pockets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's smiling face, blue jacket, black shorts, and both white shoes clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the skull, the arm tucked into the pocket, and the side of the jacket and shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the hood of the jacket, and the back of the shorts and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, with the arm in the pocket and the side of the jacket and shorts.
attribute_clothing_style: Casual streetwear style with a light blue hooded zip-up jacket, black knee-length shorts with a white side stripe, and plain white shoes. The look is reminiscent of relaxed, urban cartoon fashion.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms bent and hands tucked into the jacket pockets, legs straight and feet flat on the base, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Wide, toothy grin with large, round black eye sockets and no visible eyebrows, giving a cheerful and playful expression.
attribute_hair_style: No hair; the head is a smooth, bald white skull.
